properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: First love, You are my First love In Your presence I can't help but fall down at Your feet Savior, beautiful savior You became the sacrifice so I could be set free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take all I have, It's all Yours anyway I know it's not much But God it's my everything I pour my oil on You I pour my oil on You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: First love, You are my first Love I don't care who's In this room My eyes are fixed on You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take all I have, It's all Yours anyway I know It's not much, but God it's my everything I pour My oil on You I pour my oil on You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Doesn't matter the cost Jesus You're worthy

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Of every last drop, here is my offering I pour my Oil on You I pour my oil on You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I don't care who's in this room I don't care who's in this room I don't care who's in this room my eyes are fixed on You I don't care who's in this room my eyes are fixed on You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Every last drop Every last drop Every last drop At the feet of Jesus
